function.name: is_file_writable
function.description: Check if a file is writable.
function.long_description: Determines whether the current user has write permission for a file.
example_user_queries: Check whether ./capabilities/travel/get_distance_between_cities.json can be written to.
Is ./capabilities/time_operations/get_timestamp.json writable by the current user?
Do I have write access to ./capabilities/file_metadata/get_file_size.json?
